TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qaboos_bin_Said_al_Said, title = Qaboos_bin_Said_al_Said, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qaboos_bin_Said_al_Said} }

S.FORM: Qaboos bin Said al Said ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 11, Qaboos bin Said al Said, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Oman ta' misuw hya' ga Qaboos bin Said al Said, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 1970 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Qaboos bin Said al Said ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 11, Qaboos bin Said al Said, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Oman ta' misuw hya' ga Qaboos bin Said al Said, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 1970 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: qaβoos~ɕ βin s~ɕai* al s~ɕai* rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, qaβoos~ɕ βin s~ɕai* al s~ɕai*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw oman taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa qaβoos~ɕ βin s~ɕai* al s~ɕai*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
